rgbsig.description: RGB Signature (RGBSIG). Human-only activity proof artifact representing actions performed on a profile (e.g., avatar change, profile theme update). NON-AUTHORITATIVE and MUST NOT be used in identity resolution, verification, or authorization systems.

apa_reference.description: APA this RGBSIG event is associated with. Used only for contextual association, not identity resolution.

event_type.description: Type of human-driven profile action that generated this RGBSIG.

event_hash.description: Deterministic hash of the recorded user action. Used only for audit consistency.

source.description: Origin of the action (user, client app, or system UI). NON-AUTHORITATIVE.

status.description: Lifecycle state of the RGBSIG record. MUST NOT influence identity systems.

metadata.description: Non-authoritative metadata. MUST NOT be used in identity resolution, RBAC, registry state, federation, or exposure decisions.
